name: Tax-Free Corporate Divestitures (Spin-offs)

eligibility.description: Both corporations must meet active trade or business requirements for 5 years and the transaction must not be a device for distributing earnings.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a corporation to distribute stock of a controlled subsidiary to its shareholders without triggering tax at the corporate or shareholder level.
